sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_table SET created_at = reinterpretAsFixedString(toDateTime('2023-02-01 12:00:00')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsFixedString(255) AS fixed_string_value, reinterpretAsFixedString(toDate('2023-03-15')) AS fixed_string_date;
